review_text: The holiday park is very well located, with good power sites. However, we were very disappointed with the size of the kitchen and laundry. Only 3 washing machines and 2 dryers for nearly 150 sites! You might as well tell you that it is very complicated to be able to do your laundry. For the kitchen it’s the same. Really a shame because the park is really very good and has a lot of potential.

Great place to stay. Kitchen is huge and the pool is lovely. Quite close and easy to get into the central Airlie Beach area. Only thing I’d say would be that the WIFI isn’t the best. Fantastic stay for the price though!
Espaces communs sales
Stayed at the powered site, was good and nice facilities

An sich ein super Campingplatz. Leider hatten wir bei der Anreise trotz frühzeitigem Mailkontakt (vor 12 Uhr mittags) nicht den Preis erhalten, den es uns morgens angezeigt hat. Die Mitarbeiterin schaute sich den Mailverlauf und die Uhrzeiten an und konnte zu unserem Bedauern nicht den günstigeren Preis verlangen. Sehr ärgerlich! Ich denke, es wäre evtl. möglich gewesen, da wir uns wirklich frühzeitig gemeldet und immer schnell auf Mails geantwortet hatten.
Sonst war der Platz soweit gut

3 stars as it's Arlie and the coastal walking beaches, aqua waters are stunning. The park...Unpowered is a top paddock it's all on a slant so van is jacked up as far as I can get it and still unlevel. Full, jam packed with backpackers. Full time job trying to stop them parking you in, parking in the road, path in out. Saying reception said they can park, set up tent there. So reception has no idea how many they let in up there and they come in all night, waking to be surrounded by dome tents. The camp kitchen is bedlam with dozens of people trying to cook at once. It's filthy in there with dirty pans and sinks full of table scraps. The 1 fridge is jam packed with backpackers bags of food ( some looked like they had been there for a long time). The noise doesn't stop till after midnight. So unless your a young party person and don't care. Pay the extra for a slab, powered sites. It looked calm down there. Long waits for showers, toilets. The laundry had mud, dirt under the doors so checked ot behind door seals...mud so had to clean the machine before i could use it. Gosh even the clothes lines piles of forgotten sodden clothes etc. dumped under them. Thing is they have another area up there they use for 'storage' but if they opened it to the backpackers it'd free up the whole unpowered paddock by a third. It's next door to Coles, great. It's across the road to the wonderful Arlie beach walkway,  board walk. Great.

Mixed feelings... Good park on a whole. We had a great spot in the unpowered sites but it's 50/50 if it'll be good or bad.
Facilities were decent except for the kitchen - absolutely terrible. If you don't have your own cooking setup, stay somewhere else. 1 fridge and 1 sink for the ENTIRE campground. And it obviously got gross pretty quick.
Not a bad stay but I'd definitely stay elsewhere.

The worst caravan park we have stayed in since leaving NSW. Dirty amenities, packed in like sardines and tiny sites. Very disappointing. So many backpackers amenities need to be upgraded and cleaned more regularly
Cute campground in the middle of Airlie Beach with nice amenities do not recommend to do your laundry here. Great overall good pricing

Super schöne, große Campinganlage. Mit toller Poolanlage.
Jedoch sollte die Küche deutlich öfter geputzt werden! Sie war sehr verdreckt, an allen Tagen. das war sehr schade.
Sehr freundliches, zuvorkommendes Personal. Wir würden jederzeit wieder kommen 😊

The location is great, 30 min walk from the centre or the bus stop is right outside and takes a few minutes to get into the centre. There are a lot of sites available however the park is not set up/equipped for the amount of sites. Small dirty kitchen, which is taken up by long term camping guests most of the time. We were there 3 nights and the communal fridge never had space. Only 6 showers per gender for hundreds of people camping and the showers are not kept clean. No noise curfew, people were shouting, playing loud music late at night and we had a few campers arrive late at night/early morning hammering their tent in waking us up. We’ve stayed at many NRMA camp sites around Australia and this is the first one where we have had mostly negative experiences.

ok place to stay, sites are jam packed, wifi is non existent and amenities very dirty. lots of screaming kids and barking dogs. the speed that people drive through the park including staff is beyond dangerous,

What a fantastic park. We stay 5 nights and had a lovely time. Close to town and Cole’s is about a 10 min walk.
The park is lovely & clean and reception staff are very welcoming.
We stayed in our caravan with no problems at all.
They have a cafe & bar on site with live music most nights.
We will be back, thank you Airlie for a wonderful Anzac Day

The staff were great the pool was really nice and it was a great location to use the shops we walked into town using the boardwalk overall a great park a few things but no show stoppers - we’re in a 6m van it was tight squeeze to get in and out, the amenities weren’t great but we used our own, the restaurant and bar closed Tuesday/Wednesday just an FYi and we were placed in the smoking area (we weren’t advised of this but we thought we’d mention it in case this is something you are allergic too etc!

Nice park, great pool. Spacious sites. Very friendly welcoming manager. Nice costal walk outside of park into the centre of town. Park next door to Cole’s and shopping centre. Amenities clean however there aren’t many given the number of guests and it’s usual to have to wait for showers/ washing machines e.c.t

$60 for a campsite and its not even 7:30am and we have a worker on a loud lawnmower sounding buggy zooming past us multiple times, god knows what he is doing and he is talking in a yelling voice to guests. You can hear him across the whole campground! Crazy behaviour

We stayed at a powered camper-van site. All amenities were clean and staff were super friendly! Definitely recommend for the money! Had these lovely birds come right up close. A short board walk to the harbour.

Very dissapointed we had 5 families booked in    the cabins were very nice we also had 3 Caravan sites the 2 that we had were down the very back and it was wet and full of mud we had a caravan mat down and the muddy water was just coming through all the time we had to walk through mud and slush to take the kids to the pool disgusting never again.  And i might add that there was spare slab sights and we booked weeks in advance.  Terrible park

We had an unpowered "site". Basically just stuck up the back on a sloping, lumpy bit of grass. No demarcation. Facilities were pretty average.
The powered sites for caravans are absolutely jammed together.
Sure, it's near Airlie Beach, but...

This park is simply not set up for an enjoyable holiday. We are travelling with a large tent, and the first site we were assigned was completely unfit for camping—it was small, uneven, and rocky. We were moved to a second site right across from the building site. We were made aware of this, but told the worst of the loud noise was supposed to be over. It definitely is not; it is extremely loud.
​This is a very expensive campsite, and there was absolutely no discount offered for the disruption. The rest of the park feels old and run-down. The camp kitchen is grotty, and the tables look like they haven't been cleaned in years. Be prepared campers there is no freezer in the kitchen and the internet is non-existent at our site. The pool is okay, but again, run-down.
​It's a real shame. The location is great—an easy walk or bus ride into town—and it could be fantastic, but clearly, it hasn't been cared for. We definitely won't be coming back and regret wasting our precious holiday time choosing to stay here. 😞

Came here 4 1/2 years ago so expected that it would have been slightly maintained and upgraded since then Sadly no ...camp kitchen is run down and dirty toilets and showers haven't been upgraded they seem to be clean but old and dilapidated.
The rest of the park is in need of an upgrade.Best part is the pool which is nice and the location into Airlie and Shute Harbour which is easy getting there via a bus.
Very expensive for what it is, suggest looking at other parks so you are not disappointed.

I really enjoyed staying here, it’s really got everything you need, toilets and showers are so clean and well maintained, pool is fresh, and the camp sites are real spacious
If your staying on the far side of the caravan park on the non powered sites, be prepared for some wind, there’s nothing blocking the offshore breeze and it gets a bit hectic, but other than that, I would stay here again in a heartbeat

Poor campsite, only half open due to building work, very poor and dated facilities, non-existing Wifi (apart from in reception), someone occupied in our space on arrival, had to go back and sort with reception, very muddy site, difficult to park motor home, rutted tyre tracks, etc etc etc...would not recommend!

Staff are friendly and helpful. Room was clean and has everything you need, although very basic it does what you need it to at a reasonable price point. Your allocated on site parking is conveniently next to your room.

The campsite is well located and the kitchen is well equipped, but the sanitary facilities may not be cleaned or maintained often enough. The unpowered sites aren’t maintained either. During the wet season, we find ourselves on flooded ground surrounded by mud, which is not very pleasant. Finally, Wi-Fi is advertised in the brochure but is only available at reception, and the laundry facilities are expensive (especially the dryer). It cost us £10 in 1 and 2 pound coins for laundry that was still damp.

Wir waren zwei Nächte an diesem Campingplatz und es war bisher mit Abstand der schönste Campground unserer Reise. Besonders angenehm sind die einzelne Bäder. Die Poolanlage ist wunderschön! Das absolute Highlight war aber die Bar/ Café und die unglaublich guten Cocktails bei Lifemusik. Hier fühlt man sich sofort wohl! 🥰

The amenities were clean and nice to use, beautiful views around the campsite but the cafe and the front was the best such a calm serene spot for a lovely coffee - the blonde Irish girl working there was so kind and went out her way to help you she was a great representative of the company !

We had a wonderful stay at NRMA Airlie Beach Holiday Park and would highly recommend it.

Dog friendly park.

The amenities are cleaned daily and are always spotless. There’s a large outdoor camp kitchen that’s well set up, plus a fantastic pool area that keeps the kids entertained for hours. We also loved the Sunday afternoon happy hour at the on-site café, complete with live music – such a great atmosphere!

The location is very convenient – about a 40-minute walk into town, and only a 5-minute walk to Coles and the bottle shop. It’s a great base whether you’re staying for a week or just overnight. The campsites have concrete slabs, power and water, and there’s a dump point available as well.

The staff were friendly and helpful throughout our stay. We will definitely stay here again!
Great location and pubkic services nearby as well as a shopping centre

Stayed 3 nights here. There is two pools. The small one was almost just to us. Lounge chairs to read and relax. Space between every rv is good. Had a bit of shade. The amenities are ok. Good showers and toilets. You are very close to beach and marina. 20 min walk. We walk every night on this path with a great view. I recommend and would return

Wir waren 3 Nächte auf diesem Calping Platz. Die Sanitäranlagen waren sauber. Das Personal war freundlich. Der Camping platz ist gut gelegen man erreicht mit dem Uber/Taxi in ca. 10 Minuten das Zentrum. Das WLAN hat sehr gut funktioniert. Die Kakadus und Vögel sind sehr zutraulich und  besuchen einem täglich. Einzig schaade fanden wir, dass es für einen Camping Platz mit relativ vielen Camping Plätzen und Zeltplätzen nur 2 Grill gab wovon einer kaputt ist.

My experience here was terrible. We had a month here and was all paid for. Our site was a big mud pit. We eventually moved to a slab site which was better but you are still crammed in . Screaming children everywhere. There was nothing good about my month here except walking to town.

Would like to say a huge thank you to all the friendly staff that helped make our stay so enjoyable ☺️
The powered camping spot was awesome, with all then beautiful native ducks, birds etc...
Grounds are well looked after and all the facilities.
Thank u so much for having us, definitely recommending to friends and family.
Will be back again😊
From Todd Mackenzie and family

Our stay at NRMA Airlie Beach Holiday Park was extremely disappointing and not worth the money.

The amenities were the worst part of the entire stay. Bathroom floors were slippery, many door handles were broken, some doors were rotting, and the facilities were very run down. Half of the washing machines and dryers were out of order. The camp kitchen tables were dirty and never wiped down, and there were only two barbecues—one of which was broken.

We arrived late after arranging this in advance and were told we would be sent a gate code. No code was ever sent, which resulted in us having to sleep outside until the morning. This alone is unacceptable.

It was the wet season and raining constantly. On checkout day, over 40mm of rain fell in around two hours after raining all night. Campervans were able to leave, but we were in a tent and the campsite had very poor drainage. Water pooled under the tent and seeped through the ground, soaking all of our belongings.

Because of the rain, it was physically impossible to pack up safely or quickly without everything getting completely drenched. Despite this, we were threatened with a late fee at 10am and were ultimately charged for an extra night because it took us an additional two hours to leave due to extreme weather conditions.

The unpowered sites were extremely poor—essentially an uneven paddock at the back of the park with long grass, poor drainage, and a single half-broken tap. The area slopes so badly that water ran straight through many campsites when it rained. The walk to amenities from these sites was very long, with no attempt made to provide basic facilities for unpowered campers. We were forced to upgrade to a powered site purely to access better facilities at extra cost.

Overall, the park is poorly maintained, facilities are broken and run down, and the experience was not value for money at all. This was by far the worst camping experience we’ve had and we would not recommend staying here.

We stayed just after Christmas for a few nights. We usually have enjoyed our stay here before, and in all honesty, the park was only about 3/4 occupied. The flow of movement around the location is difficult, as with most one way driving roads, and no turn around before the exit, so drivers having challenges moving about. Many of the caravan slab sites sticking 8 inches out of the ground making them dangerous. And imagine the disappointment when the bathrooms would not be serviced for toilet paper or cleaning more than once a day, running out of toilet paper and not any extra to self stock, to be found. The dump point was backed up twice, and not cleaned up appropriately (once we had to ask staff to clean it up, as there was evident debris being exposed to surrounding campers). There were several sites unusable, flooded and/very muddy, due to the wet weather.

We've been here twice in 6 months, first on an unpowered site in low season and a cabin in high season.
Staff are always friendly. The park and amenities are kept tidy and clean.
A great park in a top location.
Highly recommended.

Great location of the campground, and the sites are also generously sized. However, the cleanliness of the sanitary facilities really needs major improvement – they are absolutely not worth the price. No matter what time of day we used them, they were always dirty. And I don’t mean a bit of sand on the floor or some grass, unfortunately it was so bad that we decided to shower at the next campground instead. This is very disappointing, as clean amenities are a major factor when deciding whether to book this campground again.

Christmas holiday visit. Powered site with water, however while power was accessible and within reach of our site, the water seemed to be 4 sites down through our campsites. The front pool was smaller and quieter. I believe children are allowed but it was only occupied by adults at the time which was nice. The front pool did not have a hand rail though, which if added would help getting in and out of the pool. Slight "wet dog" smell to the water. The rear pool is more spacious and had a lot of families and kids. Camp kitchen was stocked with pots, pans, hotplate, BBQ etc. Was clean and spacious enough. Caravan park was spacious but was very busy during Christmas holiday period. Staff were lovely during check in. Higher priced due to tourist location and holiday season demand.

We stayed at NRMA Airlie Beach Holiday Park with our caravan and absolutely loved it! The caravan sites were spacious, easy to access, and beautifully set among the tropical surroundings. The facilities were spotless, well maintained, and everything was super convenient. The staff were friendly, helpful, and made us feel welcome from the moment we arrived. The kids loved the pool and play areas, and the whole park had such a relaxing, family-friendly atmosphere. A perfect stop for caravan travellers — highly recommended! 🙌

Der Campingplatz ist gut gelegen. Die Damen an der Rezeption sind sehr herzlich und äusserst hilfsbereit. Der Campingplatz ist sehr gross, allerdings sind die Schattenplätze rar. Die Sanitäranlagen und die Camping Kitchen sind leider nicht besonders sauber.
Der Campingplatz hat eine schöne Lage aber mehr auch nicht denn in der Campingküche gehen die Grills und Steckdosen nicht. Somit konnten wir nicht kochen. Absolut nicht zu empfehlen!

Room wasa good size and air con worked well.
Pool was great and staff were very friendly.
Location is good with Coles complex next door.
Camping de bonne qualité
Great clean cabin and awesome staff. Beautiful gardens and awesome facilities.  Would definitely stay again.
Très beau camping au calme. Attention pas de wifi fonctionnel

I have stayed at this park when it was called Seabreeze and really enjoyed my time there, so was looking forward to returning, but sadly the place has gone downhill, reception staff definitely not as friendly as previously, grounds look unloved, pool looked dirty. Won’t be returning

Great Caravan Park, modern and clean. Lots of fellow travellers and everyone was friendly. It’s very close to Coles - walking distance. Has a couple of pools, great coffee shop at front. Staff are friendly and chatty. We
Powered sites are excellent and price was $44 per night.
Definitely recommend staying here on your travels.
Awesome place to stay! Staff were super helpful. Beautiful pools and surrounds.  Shirt walk to coles, bottle-o and shops. Morning cafe and  afternoon happy hour on-site

Great staff, location amd pool. We had a great stay. Only issue was the wifi, it's advertised as wifi available but this is only available in and just outside the reception area. Was quite inconvenient for anyone planning to get some work done. Consider adding wifi extenders through the park or update the description to specify the wifi availability is only in reception.

Great site
Clean Good spaces
Pools lovely
Facilities clean
Onsite cafe / Bar fabulous and close to Coles
Easy interesting walk along boardwalk to town

Nice staff. Clean toilets. Close to the action, easy walk to supermarket.
They have a couple of pools
Sites very close together, some with no shade.  Pool lovely.  A bit of rubbish laying around, specifically near ablution block.

We absolutely loved our stay at the NRMA Airlie Beach Holiday Park! The staff were amazing!!! Especially Kate and Connie (I think that was her name) so friendly, welcoming, and went out of their way to make sure we had everything we needed.  Our accommodation was spotless, tidy, and really comfortable. The pool was a total hit with my child  perfect for cooling off and having a bit of fun after exploring Airlie. The whole park has such a relaxed, family-friendly vibe and you can tell the team really care about their guests. We’ll definitely be back next time we’re in the area!!  Highly recommend!
Booked this place last minute reception was very helpful nice and quiet respectful vibe grateful overall a great stay

Had a great experience. Nice shaded camp site for once, but walking through the park, they could do with more trees,  but so can most parks. Very clean, definitely a thumbs up from us and we will revisit in the future.
Pretty crowded sites. Amenities ok. Location suited our needs at the time
Fijne camperplek. Wandelafstand naar het centrum langs de kust. Staf misschien niet helemaal scherp bij de kassa. Ws te veel betaald. Konden met de code de camping niet af 's ochtends vroeg. Lastig.
Lovely spot in the Whitsundays reception staff brilliant 👏
Had the best time at the Holiday Park.Friendly staff and the camping ground was easy to navigate to all the facilities.Highly recommend and will definitely be coming back.

Great caravan park. We really enjoyed our stay. Decent size sites with cement slabs. Good amenities and loved the resort worthy swimming pool. On site cafe was good for morning coffee and we enjoyed the Sunday Country live music.  Easy walk to Coral Sea Marina with good restaurants and next door to a Coles supermarket.
Booked for the location, quite crowded in the park.
Friendly staff. Chrissie was very helpful and well organised. The campsite is really  clean with two swimming pools . We enjoy our stay here. After some time a campsite with restaurant and bar.
Cuisine commune pas très propre en particulier les tables. Sanitaires communs en nombre insuffisants
Personal very friendly but complete unfriendly, uncompliant Management. Very expensive, vad value for the money

Fantastisch schoon park
Met alles wat je maar wensen kan.
Lay back
Goede locatie.
Supermarkt Drogist En Bus op.loopafstand
Get rid of that metal grill that sits on the dump point please. It traps poo and toilet paper as you empty your cassette toilet, is difficult to clean and it's disgusting.

Stayed 3 days camping area packed with no camping ground edicate people walking around constantly through other people's camp area. The toilets and showers were just constantly being used day and night tourists were using bathroom sinks to wash there dishes. Not enough showers for the size of the park and people just leaving a mess and wet dirty floor after having a shower even though there was squeeggy mops provided for use. One drunk person bashing other people's vans and threatened people and nothing was done about it. I would not recommend this place ill never stay there again totally overated. The Smell coming from the caravan toilet dump point was discusting from over use the park needs more than one dump point and at least another amentites block.
Unpowered “sites” are abysmal. We’ve had free road side stops with better facilities than this place. Would not recommend staying unpowered here! Pool is ok.

Wir waren mit einem 6m Camper vor Ort und waren super zufrieden. Die Lage war perfekt. Nur 25min bis zur Promenade. Einkaufen kann man direkt nebenan. Die Duschen waren super. Für diverse Aktivitäten kann man sich abholen lassen. Der Ort selbst ist super schön. Insgesamt sehr sauber und gepflegt.

Hundreds of people/caravans and tents crammed in, no personal space. The unpowered sites is basically a dusty (bearly any grass) paddock on a slope so no flat areas, and it's a free for all, no marked site spaces. Only 6 bathrooms for each gender. Not enough for the amount of people in the caravan park. On our last night our batteries were flat so asked to be upgraded to a powered site, we were charged an additional $25 for a powered site (even though it was only $10 more expensive when we booked), the powered site was no were need a socket and had to borrow an additional extension lead from another camper to reach (20m). The swimming pool was dirty and cloudy, never saw anyone cleaning or checking water. Well over priced, definitely not worth it!
Great park … easy to book in even if late … facilities are amazing … it is close to town but not really walkable. 😍 we went into town next morning Airlie is beautiful 😍

Stepped straight into a fresh dog turd when I got out of my car to set up camp. It was everywhere.
Got a refund and came to a clean camp.
The staff are friendly.

A little piece of paradise! Beautiful location with a mountain range right there and plenty of palm and native trees. Lagoon style swimming pool was awesome, even with floating been bag seats and sunbathing chairs. Right accross the road from the beach, close to the touristy bits and friendly and helpful staff.
Good location, but dirty and old amenities.

Bus à proximité pour descendre en centre ville.
Beau camping
Central with good amenities. Nice shady sites. Pet friendly and capable of taking big rigs

We stayed here for two nights and wished we had stayed in the gutter instead. The toilets and facilities are disgusting, dirty, too few and too far away from the unpowered sites. The kitchen is as basic as you can get with people mostly bringing their own cookers into the area due to lack of amenities.
We managed to step in three different piles of dog poo of varying ages and consistencies, within a few metres of our unpowered campsite. The unpowered campsites are just a patch of grass, uneven, and covered in the aforementioned excrement.
We couldn’t find recycling bins anywhere, even after asking staff and being pointed in various directions. They only seem to recycle bottles which they can get paid for. Not that I would blame the staff who all seem to be 14 years old. Which basically sums up the no care given attitude all round.

We stayed in a  crumbling shoe box, otherwise known as a studio!
The room had barely enough room to “swing a cat”, with the cheapest piece of bedroom furniture, a fridge from the 1980,s and paint flaking from the very thin walls, so thin you could hear your neighbours snoring all night!
The much vaunted Airlie Beach cafe on site had no food for breakfast and none in the next few days the grumpy waitress assured us!

At $145 per I consider this a disgrace!!

Avoid unless desperate

Terrible experience, room was nothing like wesite photo, air con stunk was horrible to sleep in and couldn't turn it off as no windows TV had one channel otherwise didn't work not comfortable at all. The guest in next room seemed to be fueled up on something as screaming and banging around till 4.30am and other guest had called the emergency number was frightening.

We booked over the phone for one night accommodation I’m disabled and when we arrived at 2.30 there was no booking for us as the Indian speaker person who took my call was new to his job and didn’t put us in the system so we ended up in the overflow grassed area up the back not happy jan we at NRMA Customers and on our trip have stayed in many of nrma parks
Lovely campsite site and caravan park. Great amenities including the pools and kitchen. Highly recommended if in the Airlie Beach area.
Very clean facilities. Great kitchen utensils.

Waste of time if you plan on camping in the non-powered section. This park is all flashy up the front, but if you decide to book a “non-powered site”  they throw you at the back of the park in the sticks for a free for all to find a spot. Good luck finding anywhere that has level ground, not to mention the craters that seem to be everywhere. Additionally the toilet is well away from this area. An area such as this should be advertised as such (bush camp). If you attempt to move and get a refund they smack you with the “high season” rubbish and deny your money back.. Would not waste your time.

Der Caravan Park war für uns zweckmäßig und okay. Man profitiert von der guten Lage kurz vor Arlie Beach (gute, regelmäßige Busverbindung vor der Tür).
Der Stellplatz war ausreichend groß und grün.
Die Einrichtungen (Toiletten, Waschräume und Camp Küche mit Grill) sind in die Jahre gekommen und nicht gut gepflegt. Wir waren drei Nächte dort und haben kein einziges Mal einen Gärtner oder Reinigungskraft gesehen. Natürlich hängt der Zustand der Einrichtung auch immer von den nutzenden Campern ab, wo manche wenige offensichtlich keine gute Erziehung genossen haben.
Das Wifi Signal war gut, jedoch gab es zu wenig Bandbreite für die Anzahl der Camper sodass es unbrauchbar war.
Für einen Besuch von Arlie Beach und der Inseln können wir den Platz empfehlen.
Beautiful campsite, clean common areas, clean bathrooms and two beautiful pools. In addition, at the entrance there is a bar which offers many meals and drinks. Highly recommended
Busy park with tight powered sites. Large powered area at back of park. Amenities a bit dated but plenty of staff keeping everything clean. Well organized camp kitchen. Good pool area.

Llegamos antes de la hora de apertura y aún así nos atendieron con toda la amabilidad, resolviéndonos una situación difícil ya que veníamos en camper, teníamos otras excursiones reservadas y no teníamos tiempo. Luego el sitio está muy bien, con baños limpios y todo tipo de facilidades. Un 10!

Just spent four days relaxing here and was perfect. Clean well maintained amenities and friendly staff. 5 minute walk to Coles and a BWS. Happy hour on cocktails on the Sunday with live music is a must. I think your site will be a major factor in your enjoyment at this park. Some are a lot more spacious than some of the others. I guess that’s always going to be the same with tourist hubs.
Cabin was excellent looked new

We’ve been staying for weeks. Fantastic staff, very friendly and always helpful.
I’ve never seen a more caring manager and helpfull team before. We‘ll definitely come back!

Sehr schöner Platz, gute sanitäre Einrichtungen und gut ausgestattete Campingküchr. Airlie Beach ist einfach toll. Whitsundays ein Muss, man kann so viel unternehmen.  Einzig ein Wermutstropfen, meinem Mann wurde von der Wäscheleine runter seine Badeshorts geklaut. Wäscheklammern waren noch da ;) dem Dieb viel Spass mit der Badehose, Karma schlägt zurück.

The caravan site we got was level with a good size concrete slab. The staff are really nice here.
Considering the great location and reputation of the park, I was very surprised by the lack of upkeep in the shower block I used.
Theres:
-mould in the tile grout
-the shower head is a great size but has exploded at the seams
-the exhaust fan cover is dirty or mouldy
-the door frame is rusty
-the walls have been sort of patched and need repainting
-old sign adhesive hasn’t been cleaned off the mirror or door.
The water was hot and plentiful, and the concept of individual shower/toilet cubicles is great, so none of these are deal breakers. It just looks like the care factor is a little low.
Maybe this is a job list for someone tomorrow. 😘

Beautiful location centrally located next to the shopping centre for added convenience, we loved that the shuttle bus for our flight over the reef picked us up out the front of reception and that unpowered camping was available. Chrissy was lovely in receptiom

We stayed in a self contained studio which had the necessities but it was a little on the basic side of things.
We checked in Wednesday evening, around 5.30pm. Our first impressions were not the best… unfortunately the girl who checked us in wasn’t particularly bothered to give us a warm welcome and seemed like she didn’t want to be there.
Onto the room, which unfortunately wasn’t great - we couldn’t raise this with the staff as  reception had closed and we had to leave before reception opened the next day.
We don’t need to go into detail because we emailed them about the issues and they responded swiftly with rectification.
This time on reception we were greeted by Chrissy who was wonderful and a fantastic example of what working in hospitality should look like - Chrissy, thank you 🙏🏻

Overall, the stay at NRMA was nice, the park it’s is spotlessly clean and the setting is beautiful. all the communal facilities were really good and provided what you need for a good self contained stay. If we had been checked in by Chrissy and hadn’t had the original issue with our room our review would have been higher - we would recommend this place.

We had an amazing stay at NRMA Airlie Beach Holiday Park! Our group of six stayed in a bungalow, which was clean, comfortable, and great value for money. The location is perfect—close to everything but still peaceful and relaxing. A special shoutout to Chrissie at reception, who was an absolute highlight of our trip—friendly, welcoming, and incredibly accommodating. Highly recommend this place for a fun and stress-free getaway!

Great location, staff were lovely and pool is great, but the amenities leave a lot to be desired. For $79 a night it was pretty disappointing to have such old and dirty facilities. Weirdly designed blocks that you couldn’t wait to get out of. There’s also such a small number of toilets and showers for the number of people staying. As an NRMA park you expect better.
Also had someone take our washing out the machine to put their own in and subsequently lost some brand new items, so maybe additional machines to deal with the capacity would be helpful so others don’t handle your personal belongings.
Ein grundsolider Campingplatz.

It’s ok. We met some amazing people BUT………the sites are small and you’re crammed in like sardines. The site we were on had a huge tree on it that made it even smaller. We met people who had been there 3 weeks and they said ours was the worst site. Not only cos of the huge tree but because the cockies in the tree damage peoples vans!!!!
We also saw at least 2 people go into the toilet/shower amenities with their caravan toilet cassette and empty it in the toilet! Yuk! There are many other caravan parks nearby. Come here as a last resort.

The location is really nice and the park itself is good, but the amenities weren’t clean enough. The worst part was the blonde girl at the office — she did her job, but the way she spoke to us was disrespectful, really bad experience.
Great neat and tidy camp grounds. Would definitely stay here again as its in a great location.

The good parts: roof, running water, hot shower, flushing toilet, comfortable bed, kitchen. Traffic noise is minimal at night. However, a Budget cabin means old, falling apart, and pretty well worn out. No insulation. Air-conditioner air is blocked by the wardrobe.  4 beds, but with room for just 2  people with luggage. A point on the literary side of written communications: the writer could be quite aggressive and negative, although the staff we encountered were very pleasant. Stayed 5 nights, but I won't stay again.

Very popular caravan park. Packed during winter (peak season). The amenities are good but not enough of them for the number of people staying here. Staff helpful and cheerful. Very caravan sites are very tight.

Very expansive for no reasons. The unpowered site is 44$ for a night and you are so far from the amenities. Only one sink in the kitchen area so had to wait.
Included with this big price : a very unfriendly young woman at reception who doesn't even give the impression that we are welcome...
I dont recommend I guess you can definitely find a better place for this price.

Unlike other NRMA Parks, this one is truly a disappointment.
The unpowered sites have nothing to do with actual pitches — they are just a sloped, poorly maintained grassy area. On top of that, there are far too few bathroom facilities for the number of guests, and they are not well maintained either.

We had booked three nights and wanted to cancel one, but this was refused with the explanation that it was "peak season" (even though it's July) and we had already entered the park, so no refund could be given.

The only real advantage of this park is its proximity to town. Other NRMA campgrounds in the same price range and in similarly popular locations offer much more.

Unfortunately, this park didn’t meet the standard I’ve come to expect from NRMA.
The unpowered sites are essentially just a large grassy field with very few level areas, and parking is unstructured.

The pool is fine, but nothing particularly special. One major issue is the lack of toilets – especially noticeable when some are closed for cleaning.

If you’ve stayed at other NRMA parks like Sydney or Port Macquarie, you might find this location underwhelming by comparison.

Also worth noting: there’s no refund for cancellations unless made a month in advance (two weeks for members), which feels a bit inflexible.

Overall, a disappointing experience – not quite what I’ve come to expect from NRMA standards.

Way to Expensive for that quality that you will get 😒 unpowerd campsites are lovelessly Designed feels like on a showground behind a supermarket. Amenitie block is far away. Not enough toilets for so much people and dirty to. No problems with that if the price was ok. There are better free camps sadly not in this area.

We were happy go stay there for two nights. Overall it was a good experience.

It wasn't straightforward to get an unpowered site booked online even. The online form didn't allow me to book a site with my van's length of only 5 m. I could make the reservation by phone however.

Toilets and showers are pretty far away from the unpowered sites. The shared kitchen is pretty good, only a oven is missing. The free Wifi did not work at all. I was never able to connect with any of my devices. I guess the network is not able to handle that many clients.

Do not recommend or rate this park. Booked and paid for a slab site to be moved to a wet grass site. Stayed five nights and only managed one hot shower. Having read past reviews the no hot water has been a thing for a while and nothing has been done. Wished I read reviews before booking.
Great facility’s but so packed if you are camping at an unpowered site there are so many tents so close together you can hear people talking when trying to sleep
We came for camping very nice place nice facilities and really nice staff

Overcrowded, limited facilities for the volume of people. There are six showers per gender, making long wait times at peak periods. Considering most people are out before 8 and back after 5, you will wait for a shower. Also, the camp kitchen is small, so you will wait there also. The place is clean, but the numbers should be reduced to cater for the number of guests. Disappointing actually. Camping spots are sloped and quite muddy. You’re paying for a prime location. That’s about it.

The installations were always clean and super useful. Everything you need in the kitchen and private bathroom with warm water. Our stay here was a delight plus the receptionist was super gentle and nice i think her name was Noa but can’t remember.
Beautiful place, immaculately kept, beautiful friendly staff,

Chrissy in reception was outstanding fitting us in despite having limited availability. 2 bed self contained villas very clean, amenities clean and accessible. Close enough to marina and shops, electric bikes for hire
Very crowded and badly planned with respect to reversing van onto site. Also sites under some big eucalypts which are prone to dropping branches so not a place Id choose again.
We had a caravan site, plenty of room .
Positives: Cafe/Bar great staff great. Reception good|Negatives: Shower toilet combo needs overall and deep cleaning scum on tiles mould in grout. Unpowered feels like homeless camp.

DO NOT STAY HERE!!
We paid for a weeks worth (that we had to pay upfront over the phone) on a ‘unpowered site’, which ended up being a big patch of grass which anyone could park anywhere. Was so packed (not even school holidays, a random Tuesday) we couldn’t even find a spot to park without running over someone’s tent and being in the wide open for everyone to look at. Only spot avaible was on a hill in a rooftop tent… not fun. We went and complained as it says online a ‘unpowered site’ and if we went out the next day our spot would be taken. We were told we would have to leave our stuff when we leave to claim our spot for the next night. Showers were so busy with lines as there is only 7 showers for each gender to service a park with over 120 sites. Went back later that night to there only being cold water. We were told ‘this happens when the park is full’. Rediculous! We free camp and only pay for parks for the hot showers! We were told the water takes some time to heat up. Went back for a shower the next morning at 6am (trying to beat the crowd) to still be met with cold water. This is a known problem to nrma yet a park this size in such a prime location seems to do nothing about the old and useless hot water system. We decided to leave as we couldn’t enjoy a whole week in beautiful airlie with no space/privacy and no hot showers. They wouldn’t refund us our next 6 nights. Absolute joke. Went and stayed at Tasman holiday park instead and extended our stay, was so beautiful. This is the Worst park I’ve stayed in my whole life I don’t know how this can run under NRMA

Yes Cold showers 🥶and weird shower/toilet combo’s.Place seemed run down and no upkeep, looks like a company bought it to make money fast then sell. Seems the same scene across all NRMA Caravan Parks here in Queensland that we have come across on our travels.
Réservation unpower site a 20$ la nuit c’est génial

Excellent park. Good size sites for caravans. Nice swimming pool area. Facilities are clean.
Grounds maintained. Friendly helpful staff.
There is a great cafe/restaurant onsite that has happy hour drinks.
Walking distance to the local shops and beach/park across the road. Also it’s a 10 minute drive into the heart of Airlie Beach.

The place is getting a bit long in the tooth. The campsite is ok, but unfortunately not very good. The sanitary facilities are partly broken and not clean. The washing machine and tumble dryer are also dirty and smelly. The pool area is also dirty and the water features don't work. Wifi is non-existenting or very, very slow. Totally OK for a short stay. The coffee at the entrance is very nice. The staff is very friendly.

We hebben prima gekampeerd hier. Er zijn voor het aantal mensen op de camping weinig douches. Bij het zwembad zijn ook weinig ligbedden, er waren mensen die hun eigen stoel meenamen. Het is leuk dat er een barretje aan de voorkant van de camping is, maar deze is niet drukbezocht, dus je gaat er niet graag zitten. Prima voor de rest, misschien alleen wat duur voor de mankementen.

The one thing you would like in a caravan park is a hot shower. Plenty of power to have electric charging points for cars which nobody uses but no power to heat the shower water. Wondered why at lunch time people were lining up for a shower, guess the problem is ongoing.

Lovely well kept caravan park with in a short walk to the water & shopping centre.  Clean & tidy amenities & laundry.  Staff very kind & helpful.  Might be worthwhile noting to have an earlier shower as my hubby had cold showers 2 nights running.  Otherwise, a lovely place to stay 😊

Cold showers! Unacceptable. It's almost winter and the nights are cold, we book a caravan park and pay good money to get amenities. And there is no hot water. Reception are apologetic, blaming the owners. Come on owners, with the amount of people you have staying here (it's a cramped caravan park), provide decent showers. A shower curtain too would be nice to stop the whole cubicle and our clothes, from getting wet.
Good location next to a shopping centre so convenient for groceries, but long 30 minutes walk into town. Parking in town almost impossible, very little available even if you are willing to pay.
Good camp kitchen and laundry facilities, but getting old and needs a thorough clean.
A great stop! Didn't use all the facilities, but the proper shower after days on the road was a much-needed treat! Clean and well-located campsite!
Comfortable accommodation and good caravan   sites.

Great park in a great location. We stayed in the bungalows for 8 nights. Neat and tidy. The only think the park is missing is a boat wash down area and a fish cleaning area. Being so close to the water these should be standard. We will be back
Great spot

Für 71$ pro Nacht für 2 Personen mit Strom ist viel viel zu teuer. Der Platz ist OK aber auch schon in die Jahre gekommen. Das Poolwasser ist super dreckig. Die Sanitäranlagen sind Abends immer voll. Es gibt 6 Duschräume, die einzeln abschließbar sind. In diesen ist auch jeweils eine Toilette. Wenn alle duschen, ist leider über längere Zeit keine Toilette frei. Das ist richtig doof. Die Rezeption ist sehr nett. WLAN war gar nicht vorhanden - auf der Mitte des Platzes.

We’ve just wrapped up over four incredible weeks at NRMA Holiday Park, and we honestly couldn’t be happier with the experience!!! From the moment we arrived, we felt welcomed, comfortable, and completely at home — and that feeling lasted right through to the very last day.

The park itself is immaculately maintained, with clean amenities, beautifully landscaped grounds, and a truly relaxing atmosphere. Whether it was early morning walks, afternoon swims, or peaceful evenings under the stars, every day felt like a perfect escape from the rush of everyday life.

What truly made our stay exceptional, though, was the warmth and attentiveness of the staff, especially Kate, the manager. Kate went above and beyond to make sure our stay was smooth, enjoyable, and full of great memories. She’s incredibly accommodating, friendly, and always ready with a smile or helpful advice. You can tell she genuinely cares about every guest’s experience, and her passion for the park shows in every little detail.💜💜💜

Whether you’re a family looking for adventure, a couple seeking a quiet getaway, or anyone in between, NRMA Holiday Park is the perfect place to unwind, explore, and create lasting memories.💜🙏🏻 We’re leaving with full hearts, big smiles, and a definite plan to return. Thank you for an unforgettable stay!💜💜💜

Thank you so much!🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻💜
Good van Park.

Service was good, Jacinta is very easy to deal with and makes you feel welcome. While the park does have free wi-fi it did not reach the bungalow area so I did have to hotspot from my phone to use the TV's for movies.

The bungalows were nice and came with a functional kitchen space including stove top, microwave, toaster, kettle and all the pots, pans, plates, utensils and cutlery. There is very little water pressure and the room I stayed in the aircon was not getting as cold as the other room and the living room.

Very kid friendly with 2 pools and water play features, I seen kids constantly riding scooters around the park but the bungalows are fairly sound proof so we were not disturbed at all and our 7 months old had 2 full nights of sleep.

All in all it is a good stay and quick access to shopping and takeaway.

We needed an unpowered site for 3 single swags. They said there was no room and put us in powered site which was powered in next door site. Muddy and no tap. Extra cost. There was clearly room in unpowered area. Not impressed at all. Staff not flexible. Never coming here again.
Schöner Campingplatz

Schöner Campingplatz mit viel Grün, zwei Pools, einer sehr gut ausgestatteten Gemeinschaftsküche und sauberen sanitären Einrichtungen. Das Preis-Leistungsverhältnis ist gut, das Personal sehr nett und hilfsbereit, wenn man Fragen oder Anliegen hat. Wir waren bei der Buchung nur etwas irritiert, dass wir wegen begrenzter Kapazitäten Kontakt aufnehmen sollten, als der Campingplatz bei unserer Ankunft (außerhalb der Saison) relativ leer war. Eine große Einkaufsmall ist direkt um die Ecke, die Strandesplanade und der Turtle Boardwalk sind zu Fuß nur wenige Minuten entfernt. Auch die Marina kann man fußläufig in etwa einer halben Stunde erreichen (Innenstadt und Lagune sond allerdings noch ein ganzes Stück weiter weg). Uns hat es sehr gut gefallen!

The Park is centrally located with all the essential shops and supermarket directly next door. Facilities are in working order. Only negative was the grounds being wet & muddy but that’s out of managements control. Very good value for money, friendly staff and would definitely stay again.
To recommend - great deal (price), not so good the weather till yesterday - now great weather - see the difference at the pictures.

Absolut empfehlenswert. Sehr saubere und gepflegte Anlage. Duschen sind eigene Räume und sehr sauber. Personal sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Meine Wünsche für meinen Stellplatz wurden alle erfüllt. Die Lage ist sehr gut. Man hat Einkaufsmöglichkeiten in fußläufig Nähe zum Zentrum sind es ca 25 min zu Fuß

Had to pay an extra $300+ for another double cabin because they wouldn't give us a 2 bedroom cabin . They said they couldn't do it because we booked through Expedia. I don't believe them. Won't stay there again. And in my opinion if you can't deal with the resort personally, don't do it online.

We had a Budget Cabin, supposed you get what you pay for 😉 It was clean and tidy but showing its age! There were things missing from the kitchen area (like chopping boards, bread knife, and I think should have condiments, but that’s me 😉) WiFi dreadful! Easy access to town and beaches. So good for a short stay!

Wir waren 3 Nächte auf dem Platz und haben uns wirklich super wohl gefühlt. Die Parzellen sind großzügig (wir haben einen Camper 7,50 lang). Dusche/Toilette sind jeweils in "privaten" kleinen Badezimmern.Absolut sauber👌 Die outdoor Küche ist geräumig und gut sortiert.
Die Pools haben wir nicht genutzt, weil es einfach zu warm war.Lieber ne kalte Dusche!
Am Eingang ist ein kleines Restaurant (ich glaube Mo und Di geschlossen.) mit gutem Speisenangebot Ab 4:30 pm ist Happy hour😉
Besonders möchte ich den sehr zuvorkommenden Service an der Rezeption erwähnen.Chrissy hat für uns 3 weitere Reservierungen für unsere weitere Tour organisiert.Toll! Bei unserer ersten Reservierung auf einem NRMA Platz wurde uns die kostenfreie Migliedschaft angeboten.Das können wir nur empfehlen (wird dann noch günstiger)

Hele fijne locatie dicht hij supermarkt en de de stad. Hele fijne vrouw checkte ons in voelde meteen welkom. Fijn zwembad was niet druk toen wij er waren. Je kan fietsen huren maar die zijn aan de dure kant. Alles was top behalve de uitrit/inrit naar de camping daar zitten veel gaten in de weg.

WE WENT STAY THERE AND IT WAS EXCELLENT, CLOSE TO EVERYTHING COLES IS NEXT DOOR. VERY CLEAN AND THE STAFF WERE VERY HELPFUL AND FRIENDLY. THEY MADE OUR HOLIDAY A GREAT ONE. WE WILL GO BACK THERE, DO YOUR SELF A FAVOR GO AND STAY THERE.

I would highly recommend this campsite for your stay in Airlie Beach. It is well equipped with kitchen, laundry, toilets, pool etc. Everything is very well maintained and is cleaned regularly and meticulously. The general maintenance of the campsite is also excellent (bins emptied several times a day, roads and pitches cleaned etc). The price is very good for the area and the services offered
The villa was nice and big.

Een prachtige grote camping met veel groen en uitstekende faciliteiten, zoals een goed uitgeruste kampkeuken en 2 zwembaden. Ook de locatie is uitstekend, je steekt de weg over en hebt meteen links en rechts mooie wandelpaden langs het water.
Wij kregen een gratis upgrade naar een prachtige cabin met eigen keuken. Dat maakte ins verblijf extra aangenaam!!
Stellplätze ohne Schatten. Leider nahe der Straße und Baustelle, damit immer entsprechende Geräusche.

Wir waren mit dem Camper dort. Man sucht sich auf der unpowered site einfachen einen Platz den man möchte auf der großen Wiese. Unterkunft ist super fürs Camping geeignet sehr weitläufig und die Outdoor Küche ist top ausgestattet. Duschen auch super. Pool wird oder wurde zu unsere Zeit leider nie gereinigt das ist ein kleiner Minus Punkt. Ansonsten alles bestens :)

A wonderful place. It has all the minimum and necessary services. They have a space where you can leave your vehicle for only $5 a day. The service provided is perfect and the cleanliness and neatness of the place is remarkable.
The park is very nicely located for Whitsundays activities. The amenities are good and clean. There are a lot of parrots and other birds. A coles is also located nearby the park.

Fabulous park, with not online great access to Airlie Beach, but also allowed us to have a couple of small critical items delivered in advance of our arrival.

I have included a couple of videos of jetski and boat tours to my review to give you an idea of what this park gives you access too!!!

Seriously, strong recommend from me!!!
Fantastic place to stay, we had a Bali villa for 3 nights and for the price we couldn’t be happier. Coming back for our next holiday. Friendly staff and well kept grounds.

Excellent location and good value for money. Everything was fine and organised! The only issue was my site spot, number 98, which is not ideal. It is located next to the bathroom, resulting in noise and bright light each night. Additionally, there is a protective wall or fence around the spot that blocks the breeze. Furthermore, powered spot number 98 is adjacent to the pool and very close to the street, which creates too much noise for anyone seeking peace. I asked for another spot at the reception but they said that were fully booked even staying 6 nights there! Anyway, I recommend it!

What a great park! All the staff we spoke to were all super friendly. Pool area was so well kept, and spotless. We also got to try the cafe, opening at 630am so was able to get a great coffee to start the day. They also happy hour, pizzas and a great range on offer. The park and cafe are pet friendly which is a plus. We absolutely will be back!
Lady's at reception very organized and happy as well.bathrooms and park well maintained and clean.highly recommend.

Lovely campsite with great clean facilities. It’s 40 minute walk into Airlie Beach but worth the walk. |Unfortunately due to adverse weather we were only able to stay for 1 night and they would only offer a credit and not a refund which was disappointing as it wasn’t our fault we couldn’t get there and a credit is no good to us as we finish our travels soon and we are from Ireland. However despite this we still had a lovely stay and would love to return some day.
Great place loved everything about this caravan park has everything you need

Nothing to complain about – truly an excellent campsite for spending one or more nights. Clean bathrooms and a kitchen area, although in my opinion, it has too few stoves. The campsite even features two swimming pools.

The best of the best 🩵

We booked in to stay for 5 nights ended up booking for more, could not fault the facilities they were clean and always tidy

The camp kitchen was 10/10 cleaned daily and very big

They had a food truck in most days which was amazing we didn’t eat with them but the food looked insane

Perfect staff could never do enough for you will be going back when we return
Thankyou guys

Overall good camping, next to shopping centre, amenities not excellwnt but good enough, nice kitchen area, a lot of space to hang clothes after laundry, many wash machines and at a good price, pits with good space, friendly staff, good pizza from 2 guys that come with their truck. Very nice pool!
The after hours check-in instructions were easy and clear 👍🏼

Cons: wifi only works at reception, pits with no shade...with those warm days, no chance to chill by the van! Luckily there was the pool. Far from centre, 30 minutes walk. A shuttle service would be awesome.
A well located, quiet Camping site with clean facilities and kind staff.

Spend 3 nights with a tent, no shade. If it rains the drainage is not that good, so it will flood your tent. Spaces are small, very growded and no privacy(better with the non electric units. Better to put on the website not to book before if you only travel by tent, space enough. Just not my type of camping. It is close to town and next to coles supermarket
Staff is friendly and helpfully

Stayed for 2 nights here as there are no free campsites in Airlie Beach and this was the most affordable one. The lady working on reception, Josephine, was so helpful and really lovely despite being rushed off her feet with customers in reception and people calling the phones. Its around a 30 minute walk into the main town along a scenic boardwalk and has all the essential amenities including hot showers. Would definitely recommend this spot for your time in Airlie Beach!
All i can say was that i enjoyed my stay in the cabin.

Es ist ein echt cooler Campingplatz und wir fühlten uns sehr wohl.
Leider wurde aufgrund von schlechtem Wetter unsere Bootstour zum Whiteheaven Beach abgesagt, hierfür kann der CP natürlich nichts. Auf unsere Frage ob wir die bereits bezahlte Nacht in einem anderen NRMA einlösen können wurde nicht gestattet. Dies sei nur zwei Tage vorher möglich... Würden wir ja in der Hauptsaison auch noch verstehen, aber jetzt wo der halbe CP leer steht finden wir es sehr enttäuschend.
Naja muss ja auf unserer weiteren Tour nicht zwingend ein weiterer NRMA sein 😜

We recently stayed NRMA Park at Airlie Beach. We have previously stayed there. But Wow this time staff welcomed us, the ground staff acknowledged us and waved. Bathroom and Kitchen were spotless.
So looking forward to coming back what a great bunch.
Regards Brett and Tania
With camper van no problem.

My husband are I were greeted by the lovely Jacinta and we stayed in the deluxe studio cabin. We did not want to leave!! The cabin was spotlessly clean and fresh and the bed and pillows were so comfortable, we slept exceptionally well. The air-con was whisper quiet and cool and the hot water for showering was perfect. The cabin had everything we needed and we cannot find fault anywhere. The entire park is really well maintained and is close to all there is to explore at Airlie Beach. We will definitely be back.

This was a great place to stay 12 months ago. Colin and Violet were involved in the park and the guests they involved everyone in all activities and fun stuff. Now what a joke try hards. NRMA have a lot to learn from other parks in the area. Wont be back...Tasman looks great

Wir verbrachten im Oktober ein paar Nächte im NRMA Airlie Beach Holiday Park und hatten insgesamt einen angenehmen Aufenthalt. Die Lage des Campingplatzes ist ideal – mitten in der Natur und dennoch in praktischer Nähe zu den Attraktionen und Aktivitäten von Airlie Beach. Die Stellplätze sind grosszügig angelegt und bieten ausreichend Platz und Komfort.

Einziger Kritikpunkt waren die Duschen, von denen es leider zu wenige gab und die oft richtig arg schmutzig und ungepflegt waren. Das beeinträchtigte den sonst positiven Eindruck nicht unerheblich.

Dennoch hatten wir insgesamt eine schöne Zeit und konnten die entspannte Atmosphäre und die gute Lage geniessen. Das freundliche Personal und die schöne Umgebung machen diesen Campingplatz empfehlenswert, und wir hoffen, dass die Sanitäranlagen in Zukunft verbessert werden.

Depuis le changement de manager, le camping n’a pas cessé de nous décevoir. Les salles de bain n’étaient plus nettoye correctement voire plus du tout.
Le personnel du camping désagréable avec sa clientèle quand il s’agit d’utiliser les toilettes de la piscine !
La cuisine du camping laisse à désirer, le frigo est sale, jamais vérifié alors qu’une indication avait été transmise pour un nettoyage. Seulement 4 feus de cuisson pour une capacité énorme de campeur. Ce n’est pas adéquat !
Un camping certes très bien situé, mais tellement dommage de voir une dégradation aussi intense depuis le changement de management
Wonderful campsite and impeccable service. Jacinta at reception was an absolute star and we felt heartily welcomed! Airlie Beach is such a gem! Thank you for everything.

Sehr schöner Campingplatz
Allerdings für den Standort und die Größe leider eine sehr kleine und nicht ganz so gepflegte Campingküche
Bei den Sanitäranlagen ist der Pluspunkt dass Dusche und Toilette in einem sind, sodass man abschließen kann und komplett für sich alleine ist.
Allerdings dadurch auch immer der ganze Raum sehr nass und nicht so sehr gepflegt.
Hatten auf anderen NRMA oder BIG Plätzen schönere Anlagen
Beautful

This holiday park is busy for a good reason. The facilities are excellent, clean and well maintained. The staff are friendly and helpful and it is a great place to book a trip to the Whitsunday's as the operators will pick you up from reception.

Très chouette camping ! Excellent rapport qualité/prix ! Les douches et la cuisine sont bien aménagées et toujours propres. Calme assuré la nuit ! Mention spéciale pour la piscine et les délicieuses pizzas de Hernan !
5 stars not enough. Very relaxed atmosphere, extremely well maintained and clean. Gardens are beautiful. A real sense of community. Hats off to staff.

We stayed for 2 nights at this park and had a spot next to the pool and camp kitchen, which was really convenient. The park is great, and the staff is friendly. Everything is good except for the bathrooms and laundry. There are only 3 washing machines and 3 dryers for the whole park, and they are always busy. In the morning, we also had to wait in line to use the shower.
Main pool is amazing for kids. Location is excellent. Grounds are clean and palmy.
great place at a great location. definitely well worth the cost
Grupo de 5 amigos que vinimos a disfrutar a Airlie y elegimos NRMA para nuestra estadía y la verdad que un 10. El bungalow muy cómodo y nuevo. Limpio y en excelentes condiciones. Muy recomendado !
Viel zu teuer, voll und völlig danebene Dusch-Klo-Kombi-Einzelkabinen ... ich will nicht in einer Klokabine duschen, sorry.

We had a great 2nt stay on our way further north. Lush green park. Sites are close together, but we weren't bothered and never felt a problem with privacy. 2 pools, 1 with splash park. Amenities bit older but clean. Great laundry. COLES next door. 5min drive into town or you can ride a bike/walk along the boardwalk to town. Loved our stay here.

Camp kitchen bare bones. We stayed here because we also stayed at NRMA Yeppoon and thought this would be of similar standard, well it is not.

Camp kitchen - no freezer? How is this possible? First caravan Park with no freezer. No detergent, tea tals, scourers.. ? If NRMA Yeppoon (and other caravan parks) can do it why can't you?

Showers, old, tiny,  no bench in cubicle, Just old basically.

We were going to stay longer but one night will do.
Super clean friendly modern park

Very good, the receptionist was lovely.
The amenities are clean, and there is plenty of space to find a spot to sleep.
It was quiet, good place to spend the night.

This was our 2nd stay at NRMA Airlie Beach & it didn’t disappoint. Great location with Coles next door & a short walk to the beautiful Bicentennial boardwalk which takes you to the marina. Some sites are a bit tight to get into & could benefit from staff assistance to direct you in. The big pool is fabulous. Highly recommend

Probably best caravan park location wise to Airlie Beach, our site was a bit rustic but was a good size for our caravan, loved the pool and all facilities were clean.
Would definitely stay here again.

The park is in a great location, is kept clean and tidy and has a lovely pool area with deck chairs.
BUT.. the amenities are terrible. Because of the design there are long waits for a shower and you need to stand there to keep your place in the queue. They are poorly lit and are wet and smelly all day. There needs to be double the number of showers and toilets for a park this size.
The wifi/internet is so bad it is unusable, you can’t even access it or load a site.
NRMA both these issues are important and are a big fail, you need to do better.

We really enjoyed Airlie Beach caravan park everything from reception to facilities and the lovely swimming pools are excellent. The only down was dirt dragged into the ensuite bathrooms but that wasn’t too bad. The Curlews are interesting and make noise for short periods
Highly rec park close to town
Très bien

This resort is an absolute must when staying at Airley Beach. From the moment you step into reception to check in.....they can't do enough to ensure you're going to have the best stay. The park is pristine and facilities exceptional.
The pool area is incredible and the bungalows have everything you could possibly need. Even after checking in l got a text message saying they hoped we have a good stay and to let them know if there was anything they could do to ensure we had the best time. Customer service makes or breaks and they went above and beyond.
Thanks for our wonderful stay....we will definitely return.

Extremely disappointing. When I arrived I had a lot of trouble getting into my spot. The kind neighbour' had to move his car. Again when i left. We had a few rain showers and it was impossible  to access the site without going through  puddles. Perhaps the ground staff could fix this as everyone was complaining around the park. Possibly the worst caravan park in Australia.

Packed in like sardines unfortunately, parking can be a real pain. Amenities are very good.
Stayed in 2019 and it was fabulous, unfortunately NMRA have acquired the park and done their thing, sad.

Most expensive sites we've ever been to by far. $88 in July $78 in August and the site we were given was ridiculously small and uneven. Ie the front of the car pokes under the awning just to get it off the road. And we've even got a tree on the corner of the block just to add to the annoyance of the site. Back corner of the van so close to the ground the leg cant be straightened and diagonally opposite leg won't touch the ground by 6 inches.
Definitely won't be coming back. Sites are a joke.

Clean, comfortable holiday park in a beautiful tropical setting. Many thanks to Violet at reception for making us feel very welcome & part of the family. Our bungalow was modern, clean & private. Supermarket handy. Would definitely recommend a stay here.

This is a great caravan park. Violet at reception is a real treasure and the team will do their very best to make your stay really enjoyable. The park has nice grounds and has nice facilities and it's cleaned regularly. It is in a stunning unique location directly opposite the park that drops down to the gorgeous foreshore. There's the fat Frog Cafe within short walking distance where you can have a great Barramundi lunch looking out across the Bay and then there is fantastic board walk you can walk along all the way into Airlie! Next door there a decent supermarket and other facilities. The park gets very busy. Some sites are better than others. And if you have a big caravan I would strongly recommend that you book early. We have loved our stay here and will be back. Prices can vary so if you can stay out of school holidays you will save money. Definite favourite.

N.r.m.a.are buying up caravan parks,but not maintaining previous standards,airlie beach has been without cooking facilities in camp kitchen over two weeks,only 2 b.b qs.for many campers,n 1 electric hot plate which died 2day n not replaced,spend some money for campers,that is what you sign up for.

Totally overpriced. I have stayed at parks so much better than this at half the price. Sites were small and ours was really hard to get into. The facilities closest to us only had 3 showers and 3 toilets. They were clean but nothing special. The internet was shocking, couldn’t get on at all even though we were near the office. Wouldn’t stay here again.

My entire check-in was a terrible experience
Without the guidance of the staff, the whole hotel check-in process is complicated. Because the whole area has a hotel area and a camping area, different areas have passwords.

in the emails I received earlier, there was no guidance and tips on the check-in process, room number, password for entering different areas, time instruction for stopping check in and other important information

When I arrived at the hotel on the day of check-in, it was already dark, I could not find any staff, and no one answered the phone, and as alone female tourist, I was scared at this point. I ended up with a guest who was also staying at the property, who put me through to the staff's private number and explained that he had been in the same situation as me on his first day.
So I spent 30-40 minutes that night, tired and hungry, checking in and finding my room.

(1) No email instructions prior to check-in
(I don't know if it was because I checked in under the name Asian, the staff thought it was okay to treat Asians differently, which in my opinion was a form of discrimination)

(2) Disrespectful attitude of the staff
When I checked out the next day, the staff asked me how I had enjoyed my stay, and I stated the above truthfully that the staff did not listen carefully, but in the course of talking to me, they turned to other customers and ignored me, which in my opinion was very disrespectful

(3) The hotel party tries to evade responsibility in the later stage
I checked in on the evening of July 16, and received an email from the hotel at 6:35 PM that day, informing me that there would be no staff on site after 6 PM to check in.

I checked out on the morning of July 17, and received an email from the hotel about the room number and access password at 3:35 PM on 17 July，but I've already checked out that time.
All these need to be informed to me before checking in on July 16, and they were sent to me after I checked out, in order to escape responsibility.

I have emails and the time of the emails to prove all the above comments.
Perfect place to stay on your holidays, unpowered was cheap, but  good value, good camp kitchen and amenities... Will stay there again

I’m reviewing a self contained bungalow in this popular Airlie Beach holiday park 🏠

We chose this great facility for a number of reasons;
Five of the bungalows are equipped with type 2 EV chargers ⚡️
The bungalows are spotlessly clean, tastefully furnished and very well equipped  ✅
There is a Coles shopping centre right next door 🛒
All of the highlights of Airlie Beach are conveniently nearby 🏖️
The park is well cared for, offers great on site facilities and the staff are friendly & helpful

I’d highly recommend enjoying your next Airlie Beach holiday in a lovely two bedroom, self contained Bungalow in this awesome park 🏆
Love love love it here. Great place to stay!
Great location and huge site for our motorhome. Loved it.

We made a booking for a specific site 4 months prior to arriving.  We were very disappointed that we were told that site was no longer available and were now placed on a very  muddy site just up from a smelly dump point which other people made complaints about while we were there.   The facilities generally need upgrading.  We have previously stayed at this park and thought it to be quite good, but it is becoming a bit run down.

Stayed here for 4 nights.
There was a hiccup with the booking system that had the wrong length of our caravan.
The lovely receptionist did some creative shuffling and found us suitable
The information they provided about the local area was great too.
Perfectly located near a coles and walking/ biking track on your doorstep
Tight sites and roads in the park ,tricky maneuvering when all sites occupied but was lucky that opposite caravan left before us

We were in a RV.  Staff were very helpful when we needed to extend. Amenities blocks were well maintained and cleaned spotlessly. Would recommend to all ages including families. Villas were also very nice.
Fantastic park with great spots, clean amenities close to everything will be sad to leave but will be back, very PF

El camping es amplio y está muy limpio pero la cocina es muy pequeña e incómoda para tanta gente. Tuve que esperar más de una hora para cocinar y otra para fregar los platos. No hay un sitio para estar con niños y la distribución de los baños es muy rara. Está bien para una noche y nada más.
A nice caravan park highly recommend...close to shops and nice walk along the waterfront close to the park
Was originally booked to camp but last minute changed to the studio rooms. Neat little basic room. Woodfire pizza on the Sunday night was great.
Great spot...shopping close to park ...bike paths everywhere...can ride to Airlie Beach from here easy. ..
Fantastic Holiday Park

We stayed at NRMA Parks and Resorts location at Airlie Beach for four nights. We loved the central location of the park - it’s just outside of Airlie Beach but that also allowed us to get to the shops out of town easily enough. In fact the park is right next door to Whitsunday Shopping Centre with a Coles and other specialty shops.

Highlight for us is the tropical vibe and an awesome resort style pool at the back of the park (also a basic pool at the front, but we never swam there). It’s a lagoon style pool that our 3yo absolutely loved, except for the mosaic tile crocodile at the bottom of the pool (why would you do that?! ha).

The shower facilities in the middle of the park are definitely unique - it’s the first park we have come across that you get your own shower and toilet in its own section. It’s like having your own ensuite - you just have to walk to get to it. The downside is that they are very popular at peak times and twice I was not able to shower when I wanted to.

NRMA Airlie Beach Holiday Park is a fantastic destination for a relaxing and enjoyable stay in Airlie Beach. My recent visit left me thoroughly impressed with the facilities, service, and overall experience.

The holiday park offers a range of accommodation options to suit different needs and budgets. We stayed in a self-contained cabin that was clean, comfortable, and well-equipped with everything we needed. The cabin featured a cozy living area, a fully functional kitchenette, and a comfortable bed, making it a home away from home. For those traveling with their own setup, the park also provides well-maintained caravan and camping sites.

One of the standout features of NRMA Airlie Beach Holiday Park is its beautiful, lush surroundings. The park is meticulously landscaped with tropical gardens, providing a serene and picturesque environment. The swimming pool area is fantastic, offering a great spot to cool off and relax. There’s also a well-equipped playground that kept the kids entertained for hours.

The amenities at the park are excellent. The communal BBQ areas are perfect for cooking up a meal and socializing with other guests, and the clean, modern facilities make your stay convenient and comfortable. The park also offers free Wi-Fi, which was a nice bonus for staying connected.

The location is ideal—just a short drive from the heart of Airlie Beach, where you can explore the local shops, restaurants, and the marina. It’s a perfect base for exploring the Whitsundays, with easy access to tours and activities.

The staff at NRMA Airlie Beach Holiday Park were incredibly friendly and helpful. From check-in to check-out, they went out of their way to ensure we had a pleasant stay, providing useful information about the local area and always greeting us with a smile.

Overall, NRMA Airlie Beach Holiday Park exceeded my expectations in every way. The combination of excellent facilities, beautiful surroundings, and outstanding service makes it a top choice for anyone visiting Airlie Beach. Highly recommended!
Great Facilities - Excellent Service. Clean Park and plenty of room between sites
Great park in a great location, awesome pool area good clean amenities

This was our favourite caravan park on our entire trip up north! Violet at reception was so helpful and even recommended a lovely nursery in town with a food van making delicious breakfast. Great customer service! Everything was clean and convenient to use. Can't wait to go back again! Totally 💯 recommend this caravan park!!

We stayed at NRMA Airlie Beach recently and what a wonderful stay we had. The cabin had everything we needed and more in a really lovely setting. The owners and people in the office could not have been more helpful or accomodating. They helped us with suggestions and getting around. There are  shops and a Coles a few minutes walk one way and a fantastic restaurant the other way. The bus stop across the road takes you into Airlie in two stops or you can walk via the Marinas and soak in the views. We had a fantastic stay and will be back over and over again. Thankyou. Leanne and Calvin Millard
Such a  great place for your stay when visiting Airlie Beach. Beautiful Balinese style accommodation with warm and welcoming staff.

Stayed for one night on an unpowered site.
The staff is very friendly and welcoming. Location is great as it’s very central. The unpowered sites are in the back of the camp. It’s just a big grass field which is great as a lot of vans can stay. However the wifi does not reach the area. It’s very quiet during the night. The bathrooms are clean but as there is no curtain for the shower everything will get wet. This includes toilet as well as it’s in the same room. The „kitchen“ is just two bbq areas so you can’t cook anything in your pots and pans. That is a bit disappointing.
However for the location and the camp the price was very reasonable compared to other camps.

Fantastic appartments!!
A friend and I stayed in one of the brand new studio apartments, one QB and 1 set of double bunks. Full kitchen with dishwasher and all. It had a beautiful large veranda overlooking gorgeous gardens.
Lovely staff. The apartment had beautiful decor,  spacious, and well stocked. Highly recommend it!
The staff from the start were lovely and so helpful! They were happy to help us. The cabin was lovely. It was in a convenient location walking distance to the local shopping centre.

A few pros and cons about our stay for 4 nights in May 2024.

PROS beautiful swimming pool (2 actually!), close to city centre, dog friendly and regular pizza van visits of an evening. Also close to Coles for your groceries.

CONS no lights on the roads at night, pool open until 8 but no lights, on a very busy road and only one set of lights to cross about 500m down the road. Also very very small sites. A full park would look more like a parking lot than a caravan park.

Reception staff are great. The Studio rooms viewing the garden are a little depressing, the rooms are small and feel like a prison but they are clean so that's a plus. Even $80 is a bit steep for a prison room with a garden view. That being said, the communal area isn't too bad and the camping pads look alright.
Very central Hotel. Close to Airlie Beach Centre. Excellent service - received a free upgrade from double room to bungalow 🥰 110% recommend!!
Friendly staff, good amenities and camp kitchen.

Wir hatten eine sehr gute Zeit im Airlie Beach Holiday Park. Wir hatten die Auswahl zwischen 2 Amenitie- Blöcken und 2 Pools. An einem Tag hatten wir den kleinen Pool ganz für uns allein.
Innerhalb von 20 Minuten zu Fuß ist man an der Marina, also haben wir den Bus gar nicht genutzt.
