Wir hatten eine Schnorcheltour gebucht und eine freundliche Dame an der Rezeption hat für uns die Abholung am Morgen organisiert. Mega!
Die Camp Kitchen ist groß, schön und luftig. Von den 6 Badezimmern in dem runden Block waren an einem Abend 4 nicht so ganz sauber, aber dann kann man ja problemlos in den anderen, älteren, aber stets sauberen Block wechseln.
Einzelner Nachteil: Unser Stellplatz hatte keinen Schatten und unser Campervan keine Markise. Aber dann geht man halt an den Pool. Dort ist genug Schatten.
Stayed over the weekend, was fantastic, close to all our favourite spots great value for money, the cabin was nice 👍.

Nous sommes restés 3 nuits + 2 nuits où nous avons garés notre van pour seulement 10$/nuit ce que nous ignorions et cela nous a été directement proposé.
L'emplacement est top à 5 minutes en voiture du centre ou 20 minutes à pied.
Cuisines, douches et toilettes propres !
Les 3 dames à qui nous avons eu à faire étaient d'une gentillesse profonde !
Très bonne expérience, à recommander avec plaisir 😊

The tent site is not recommended when it rains a lot. There's only a random grassy area without a proper base. The lawn looks bleak and hasn't been mowed. The way to the toilets is quite far from the campsite.
perfect location with great camp kitchen including boiling water, electric hob and fridge. numerous charging points available around camp, clean hot showers and toilets
Very good campground, nice amenities but quite small kitchen for the amount of people even in low season (van traveling)
Amazing holiday park! Great pool, great kitchen, and cheap as well! However it's quite a walk to Airlie Beach center.

Absolutely Amazing service , amazing spot for a few days or weeks lol .
Colin , Violet and Chrissy really lovely people and provide excellent service .
Easily our best holiday park experience of the Queensland trip .
Highly recommend!

Ben

We received very bad treatment from the person who claims to be the manager/owner. He was aggressive without any reason. He never apologized. He created a horrible moment for us. They couldn't resolve a simple situation as we deserved. Such a pity. Definitely not worth even one star.

We came to this campsite because we had previously stayed in Yeppoon with the same brand, and it was really a disappointment. The grass was tall and full of toads. Furthermore, we received very bad treatment from a man who claims to be the “manager.” The client is cared for and helped, he is not treated badly. We had a wonderful stay at NRMA Capricorn Yeppoon, the campsite was spotless and the people at reception were very friendly. They do not have the same ethics and criteria. They seem like two different brands.

Bad experience. We went with a couple of friends and stayed for a few days. One day we had an issue with the boomgate code. Our friends' code didn't work to enter, so we used ours to pass with both cars. As soon as we entered, two people approached us shouting and treating us like criminals. They wouldn't stop yelling and wouldn't let us explain the situation. The man seemed drunk and was insulting. It turns out these people were the owners. Instead of coming to the boomgate to ask if we had any problem when we were trying to open it and couldn't, they waited for us to enter to treat us badly. After a while, we could explain the situation, and they didn't even apologize. That's not the way guests should be treated, especially by the owners.
P.S.: The following two days, the boomgates were open all day. It doesn’t make sense.
Lovely owners, beautiful park set up, great facilities. Located to all things available at Airlie Beach & Shute harbour.
Our stay here was very pleasant. Check in staff were lovely and extremely accommodating. Showers and bathroom was clean and is value for money. Will be staying here again!

An ok site for a few nights, we had a unpowered site in the grassy area at the back of the camp, the ground was a little uneven so you may have to drive around a bit. Kitchen a bit cramped with only 1 hob but did the job. The toilets were fine, bit of a weird set up but mostly clean, only thing I would add is that you have no way of drying your hands after you wash them in the shower/toilet.
Pool was fantastic one of the best we have been in! But definitely over priced, also came here in low season not high season and still didn't get our racv discount so just keep in mind that they go off their own calendar for the discounts. Another thing to add was the entry barrier was broken for two days which in turn made me have to get out, walk in the rain to reception to ask them to open it, then have to deal with the receptionist rolling her eyes and being extremely rude about THEIR problem.
Camping très calme et bon rapport qualité prix une cuisine est a disposition pour les personne en tente ou en voiture

We had been travelling down from Cairns to Brisbane in a small campervan with no air-con, when we got here we decided to ask if we could upgrade our campervan booking to a bungalow, the ladies were so helpful and managed to get us one due to a cancellation, they were so accommodating, transferring the money we had already paid to the cost of the bungalow. We had been really looking forward to the Airlie Beach part of the trip and this just put the icing on the cake. The bungalow was just amazing and great to finally have air-con and a proper  bed. The park was very clean and situated very well for what we wanted. Just a 5 minute drive into Airlie Beach. But far enough away if you want to be away from the hustle and bustle. Love it here and will certainly return in future. This place is a little bit of paradise!!

I Stay at NRMA Airlie Beach Holiday Park whenever I stay at Airlie which is quite often I really enjoy staying there as the park is always kept very clean and the park has ample amenities and the Pools are amazing and every time I stay at the park I’m greeted with a smile from the Awesome Staff who are very knowledgeable and extremely helpful every time I visit they treat me like family This is the Park to Stay when you Visit Airlie Beach 😎

Great location with lots of potential for improvements. Amenities need more regular cleaning when in peak season. After travelling 7hrs with our friends upon arrival we were told our booking had been changed by an employee and the new site didn't accommodate the size of van. The replacement site offered couldn't fit our van as the neighbouring site had a dog pen which took up part of the site we were given and there were trees in the way. My husband, our friends and I then had to walk around in the scorching heat looking for a site that would fit our vans as reception didnt seem to have a clue on what site fitted what and no caretaker in sight to assist. In the end we had to take a site which had zero shade away from our friends which was disappointing as our original booking had us next to each other. There was a huge lack of customer service when dealing with this issue and we were made to feel it was our problem not the parks. I have read there are major upgrades happening in the park which will hopefully improve standards overall especially site bookings/allocation and customer service.

False advertising a NRMA PARK offer's discount % but not on Holiday seasons $76 is a joke for a run down, small sites no room for boat ect, the only plus was Boom gate was open for convenience. But hard too drive in from north side of road take care. Too Expensive, kids in pool at night, Stay out of town $30 a night. (Ps fish and chips were best next door.)
Won't be back again.

We got a great lot with power and water right beside a small pool and easy access to shower and toilets.

Great location for the marina where many tours to the reef for snorkling etc depart.

Only reason not 5stars was cleanliness of toilet/shower area for the price of about 160$ for 2 nights.
We had a caravan .Great location. Clean,friendly,helpful and recommended.
Good facilities, friendly staff and great sites. Really nothing to complain about.
great place

Parked our campervan here for 3 nights! Our first site was under a tree that was full of birds but they accommodated our request to move to another site no problem! Good amenities, very clean, good WiFi, clean pool, good atmosphere around camp. 25 minute walk into airlie beach. Perfect for what we needed!

Arrived staff could hardly give us the time of day care factor nil!! Park obviously getting work done lots of construction happening!  Lots of sites away from this were available but we were given site 120 in the dirt copping all the dirt and dust from construction no grass or slab provided!!  Looking over to where all the other caravans were in nicer areas with grass!!
Was this because we got the 30% off deal?  Not sure but won't be back!  Travelling around Australia and worst experience ever!!
Perfekter Campingplatz

If we could we would give 11/5 stars for the service! The service was great! Due to heavy rain, we had to change spontaneously from a slab site to a lodging, Violet helped us a lot and gave us a huge discount. When our bum bag with the lodging key got stolen (yep, quite the ordeal), she helped us in the middle of the night, gave us a new key and now, thanks to her, we even found our belongings back (no bum bag tho :/ but everything else yayyyy)!
Basically, staff, location, park was just great and y’all should stay at this Holiday Park <3 greetings from two lost girls :))
Great service, clean grounds and very comfortable bungalows

An awesome place if you're on a budget; everything from the unpowered spots to the cabins, including amenities, is clean and well-maintained. The location is perfect for dining in waterfront restaurants and walking around the marina. The staff were always kind and keen to recommend the best touristic places and things to do.

It’s was amazing and fantastic reception!
The staff so very friendly! The cabanas was very clean and brand new the ar condition worked fantastic ! The pool was amazing the location is near for the center I am so grateful for everything there

Mixed review from me. If you like being surrounded by backpackers who party all night, slam car doors and yell out loudly, then it's the place for you. Nice pool. Amenities questionable,  not much shade, no grass, just rocks, leaves & dirt.Very disappointing,  expected more given the park is NRMA brand.
Yo lugar súper recomendable para quedarse 1 o varios días muy amables y el lugar preparadisimo con piscinas lavadoras baños 💯 un diez
Great location, stayed in the non powered site

We stayed here for 4 nights. Actually its a nice holiday park, relatively close to Airlie Beach and a nice pool. BUT the restrooms and showers were not great at all. I don't even know if they were cleaned daily, didn't seem like that. Often, there was no soap in the "shower and toilet cabins", floor was full of hair and the female toilets were dirty 90% of the time. I always brought my own sanitizing spray. Washing mashines also smelled bad. Wifi didnt work during our whole stay, except you stay directly next to reception.

Mooie camping met veel ruimte voor het kamperen of het plaatsen van een caravan. Er is een grote keuken aanwezig. Wij hadden alleen zeer slechte connectie met de WiFi afgelopen weekend, dat was erg jammer. Zwembad is ook erg schoon en netjes onderhouden. Wij vonden het vanuit onze persoonlijke mening niet erg hygisch dat een dweilstok stond in de doucheruimte om hiermee de vloer droog te maken. De haren van anderen mensen zaten eraan. Misschien is een trekker een betere optie? Het personeel is erg vriendelijk en behulpzaam. Eten bij het restaurant was lekker.
Lovely pool clean and tidy too
Very luxurious place.

One of the worst campgrounds we had experienced on our road trip. After we had already spent the night in Yeppoon on a great NRMA park, we were really disappointed here. So crowded the campground. Unpowered site was also not nicely laid out. Restrooms and showers were not that great. And too few for the amount of people. Front desk staff was very friendly and accommodating. Good located, close to Airlie Habour. But would not recommend the site.

I stayed here for 4 nights in a powered tent site. Site 55.
Right next to the pool at the front of the park. Across from the amenities also.
Was a very great spot. I was very impressed with the site I had.
Staff were very friendly upon arrival.
A short drive down the hill to the heart of Airlie and a 2 minute walk to Coles and other shops. Its in a great location.
I would definitely stay here again.

Nice campingplass With friendly staff 10 minutes away from Airlie Beach. Shopping mall just by. Very limited common kitchen equipment. Nice pool for kids. We were unlucky with some noisy neighbors having a party until 11 pm

Les prix pratiqués ne correspondent pas à ceux du site officiel.
Trop cher pr ce que c'est.
Concernant la piscine autant aller à celle d'Arlie beach plus grde

Although we booked well in advance as it was school holidays, we got a slab near the exit of the park. The way the park is designed, there is one main road going through it and anyone parked on that main area, particularly those close to the entry and exit will hear nothing but cars going in and out. Incredibly noisy and annoying as it is also adjacent to the main road. People also don’t stick to the speed limit (10kmh) and race past endangering kids and pets. If you’re considering this park, please have a look at the map and stay clear from the main car loop or ask for a discount if those spots are the only ones left. The sites are pretty small as well. Toilets were clean and nice. The ladies bathroom at the front of the park is not well thought out with just one hand dryer at the end of the block in front of the one proper mirror and the shower. So you’re always in the way trying to get your hands dry. The pools looked nice and clean and the staff were very friendly when we arrived. They had one activity for the kids during our 4 day stay for which we were notified about via text. Perhaps more activities would’ve been nice during these school holidays. Location is good, close to shops but also adjacent to the main road which gets so busy that it is very challenging cross. And very noisy. The park was very dog friendly and having an off-leash area nearby a great bonus for our furry friend. The park even gave us a dog goody bag with some treats and a document outlining all the dog friendly cafes and walking areas. So considerate.
We have done the big lap and stayed at many caravan parks. This would’ve been a 4 star review had we not been placed near the exit.

Having left Cairns and headed south along the Pacific coastal way our next port of call was the lovely Airlie Beach, famous for its access to the Whitsunday islands.

We had experienced the NRMA life in Cairns and it was ok. So thought we would stick with it in Airlie. The park is larger than Cairns and the on-site facilities were clean and decent. Staff were very helpful and you had free WIFI.

However just like Cairns the powered part of the site if pretty crammed and you are living on top of each other. The non powered side was far less crowded and you could park where you wanted.

There are swimming facilities onsite but they are more suited towards children.

The walk to town takes about twenty five minutes but do take the coastal walk it’s far nicer and a lot safer.

All in all a decent site.

Very Freindly & beautiful grassed & concrete pads for caravan area
Really well run
Stayed in Donga room. Worst stay in our 6 week trip.. Needs to be burnt down

Gute Lage ,freundliche Rezeption.
Sanitäreinrichtungen seht beschränkt.

Great place to stay! Pretty close to Airlie Beach with a beautiful board walk to the Lagoon and town. Service from the ladies at the front desk was fantastic and super helpful. Definitely recommend staying here 👌

We stayed for a week and had a great time. Clean facilities and lovely hot showers. Some days we didn’t leave the park and just sat/swam by the pool all day. When we did leave the park it’s a beautiful 30 minute walk into Airlie Beach. Redcat boat tours can pick you up/ drop off from reception.

The way the park is set up is pretty good. Ample room for car and van. Shower/Toilets were pretty mouldy and not many considering how many people staying in the park. Reception staff were not that friendly comparing with other parks we have stayed at and considering it is a tourist town. The fish and chip shop attached is not very good.
But it is near a little bar and a shopping centre and a quick cab fare into Airlie if you want to go out there. Location wise it is a great spot.
Bien placé piscine cuisine et table pratique pour les campeurs.
Lovely park very clean , amenities are good .awesome pool, comfortable bungalows but the beds are reminiscent of high school camp beds , could be more comfortable and less sqeaky but otherwise great

No power tent site
Very good site plenty of room. 36 dollars
Great spot love the park great feel to the park paradise great staff great pools
Payed $75 for an unpowered site along the side fence,  not even on grass, and not even peak season. Absolute price gouging. Good location was the best thing.
Very clean park.

We stayed in the unpowered section, which was a large area with lots of nice trees at the back of the block.
Amenities block was nice and clean.  We appreciated the shower/toilet combos, plus separate toilet block.
The pool area was nice and clean (though too cold for us to swim).
There's a shopping complex within easy walking distance too.

The park is beautiful, in a great location. The park is nice and green, and the pool was very clean!
The camp kitchen was brilliant. The sites are very small, with most people having issues parking their vans, or finding somewhere to park their car afterwards.The abolition blocks need cleaning more than once a day.

This caravan park is beautiful, it has everything you need, a pool, outdoor camp kitchen, bikes to rent for a ride along the beach and even a fish and chip restaurant! The location is very close to the town and just a short walk away from the shops.

Such a shame for a 30day cancellation notice to get deposit money back even In peak period times. Given over a week notice and they lump that on you. No Consideration of breakdowns or medical.

Such a shame, who knows 30 days out!!
The campsite is very beautiful. The amneties are clean and the kitchen is big with bbq and lot of chair.

I have just had the best experience! The team on reception were all so lovely, very accommodating and just had the time of day to have a conversation with you. I appreciate these types of people and it is certainly a reason why I'll return 🙂 the unpowered sites were reasonably priced given the location, and I also arranged to store my car for the week while I went away from the area. So easy to extend my stay too. Very happy! Thanks team

We highly recommend this park. Amenities were clean. And the staff were all very friendly. Violet went above and beyond for us & we are very grateful ! Great position close to everything you might need. Billie & Rick Anderson

The worst NRMA I have visited. The camp kitchen facilities are dirty and unmaintained. The amenities block has an open shower which has very minimal space for toiletries, and the whole area becomes wet due to no shower screen, which is unsafe when changing. Staff were rude, the camp fridge is locked at night and a trailer is an extra $10 a night, which was not stated when I booked. Ideal for caravans who dont need the amenities and backpackers. Don't waste money there.

We stayed in a clean bungalow at a beautiful location… friendly staff… nice swimmingpool…

We can recommand this accomodation.

My boyfriend and I are staying in an unpowered site here for a month now and we absolutely love this camping. The staff and the owners are very helpful and friendly, the amenities are big and always clean with a nice hot shower. We cook at the campkitchen, which has everything you need like a cooking plate, barbecue, microwave and fridge and is also always clean.

We were booking to stay here as we've done on previous years but were told a caravan site for 2 people for two weeks would cost over $1000😳, that's $75 per night. This is peak season they said (not even school holidays!), and we use dynamic pricing (yes we know about that rorting system) then the less then helpful manger said very abruptly that she has no control over the prices and talked me down, refusing discuss it further and cancelled my booking!! What a poor example of customer service from a so called 'manager' and absolute price gouging of travellers charging that amount. Zero stars to NRMA corporation for robbing your loyal members

Good location, great pool friendly service but smallish sites and weird hexagonal amenities block with six triangular shaped rooms each with a shower, toilet and basin which means doing laps of the complex to find an available room and that the floor is always wet even if you just need the loo.  Narrow road means difficult movement of vans in certain circumstances.  Pretty good overall.
The location is great, yet the kitchen was very small and packed. Only one BBQ area was working out of the two.

Lovely outdoor kitchen which is great to meet others. We parked under a tree which I wouldn't recommend... Lots of green ants EVERYWHERE!
Hard to get pegs into the ground in the unpowered area but still a good floor.
There's a bus nearby that comes every 45 minutes to go into town but you are only 25 minutes walk away and only 5 minutes from Coles.
Would recommend, bad customer service from one lady but we won't let that affect our rating too much...

A great place to meet new people and make friends. The unpowered sites are free roam and there's lots of space. The ground is really hard so be prepared to not get your pegs in the ground! The camp kitchen is small with only 4 electric burners for a large campsite. 2 of the 3 BBQs do not work. Unfortunately we had a bad experience with a rude member of staff who decided to create her own "Curfew" of the kitchen area and kicked us out in the evening. There are many ways to talk to guests and maybe a customer service course would go a long way for that lady.

Great place to meet people and lovely crowd around, however, the sites for unpowered camping are on ground which is very difficult to drive pegs into, even with a mallet. The price is fair if not slightly high for the standard. Furthermore, we were advised by staff to leave the kitchen area at just past 10pm, and whilst we understand the need to have a curfew, we felt the manner in which we were addressed was extremely rude and dismissive and we feel she overstepped the mark in this case. Overall, a nice park, but needs a few changes to justify its price point.

100% recommend this place. My family and I stayed in a bungalow for just 1 night and it was amazing. Everything was clean (no water spots on the dishes or glasses either). Has a very comfy couch with a large TV in the living room. Beautiful kitchen with all the cooking space you need, along with a large fridge, pantry and stove top. The beds were very comfortable with amazing fluffy pillows.

Thank you for the stay. Definitely coming back.
Great location, wished we'd have stayed longer

Such a quiet park, spacious grassy sites and really clean amenities, and huge showers, there is actually room to move. Good location to walk the boardwalk into town, only 2.5kms. lived not having trees above us. The staff were lovely and really helpful and friendly. Amazing place to stay while you explore the area.
Simply the best on our budget. 💯 %
Really great place. Love that the showers have hot water
good location, dog freindly, loads of room out the back in the unpowered site, unlike the caravanners,...
Amenities are a bit basic but overall clean. Pool is very nice. Police and security patrolling at night, safe.

I recently stayed at the NRMA airlie beach holiday park it was a fantastic experience the accommodation itself was clean, spacious and well-equipped with everything we needed to make our stay comfortable and enjoyable we were able to completely unwind and relax.
The location was perfect with stunning views we were able to enjoy the local restaurants, shops and entertainment all within a short distance from our accommodation.
One of the highlights of our stay was the exceptional customer service we received from the staff they were friendly, helpful and available to answer any questions we had and also provided recommendations for things to do in the area they went above and beyond to ensure that our stay was a memorable one we can't wait to come back.
Was a nice place to stay for the night. Unfortunately weather wasn't great to enjoy it more.

Alquilamos el site unpowered. El lugar es muy bueno si quieres experimentar y pasar la noche acampando. Los baños limpios y correctos, la cocina media chica para toda la gente que se aloja, pero correcta. Un lugar muy recomendable para alojarse si estás haciendo roadtrip y sobretodo económico.

We did enjoy our stay here. We were in the unpowered area where you just pick a spot. Much more affordable than the big4. Sites were relatively level and was plenty of spots. Amenities were clean and a good camp kitchen.
We rode into town so not too far.
Great spot to stop & explore the area👍
